name: Puzzledom
short_description: A comprehensive collection of 3D minimalist puzzle games, including various classic puzzle games such as Sokoban, Unblock, Connect, Ball Sorting, Sudoku, Folding, Line Way, Tile Match, Binairo, Number Chain, Hashi, Shikaku, and more. Each puzzle has 3 difficulty levels: Simple, Medium, and Hard
detailed_description:
A comprehensive collection of 3D minimalist puzzle games, including various classic puzzle games such as Sokoban, Unblock, Connect, Torus Sort, Sudoku, Folding, Line Way, Tile Match, Binairo, Number Chain, Hashi, Shikaku, etc. Each puzzle has 3 difficulty levels, simple, medium, and difficult.

Each puzzle game contains a large number of levels, ranging from 300 to 1800 levels, with a massive number of levels that will keep you playing until the end of time.

The game is operated using a mouse and keyboard.

Continuously update and create a puzzle encyclopedia.
about_the_game:

Each puzzle game contains a large number of levels, ranging from 300 to 1800 levels, with a massive number of levels that will keep you playing until the end of time.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Korean, Japanese, Italian, Russian, Turkish, Polish
